item.title: Footer Merchandise
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Each piece reflects a perfect balance of timeless artistry and modern innovation.

Company
    • About Us
    • Contact Us
    • F.A.Q.
    • About Us
    • Contact Us
    • F.A.Q.
Info
    • Refund
    • Cookies
    • Terms of Use
    • Privacy
    • Refund
    • Cookies
    • Terms of Use
    • Privacy
Social Links

  • X
  • Discord
  • Facebook
  • Instagram
  • X
  • Discord
  • Facebook
WoodMart theme 2026 WooCommerce Themes.

item.title: Single product layout Merchandise
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Home
Frodo Baggins Figure $44.99 Back to products The Mandalorian Spectrum $25.00

Chicken Plush

SKU: GM-PL-3

Cute and cuddly Minecraft Chicken plush with pixel-perfect design. A fun collectible for fans of the game!

$40.00 Original price was: $40.00.$28.47Current price is: $28.47.

Add to wishlist

Size guide

Size UK US EU Japan
XS 6 - 8 4 34 7
S 8 -10 6 36 9
M 10 - 12 8 38 11
L 12 - 14 10 40 13
XL 14 - 16 12 42 15
XXL 16 - 28 14 44 17
Size guide Brand: GameVault

Customer Reviews

You may also like…

Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Add to cart

Hats $22.60 -23% Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Add to cart

Alex Minecraft Figure

Figures $49.99 Original price was: $49.99.$38.25Current price is: $38.25. Hot Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Select options This product has multiple variants. The options may be chosen on the product page

T-Shirts $28.65 Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Add to cart

Back to the Future Poster

Posters $18.20 -29% Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Add to cart

Chicken Plush

Plushes $40.00 Original price was: $40.00.$28.47Current price is: $28.47. -15% Compare Quick view Add to wishlist Select options This product has multiple variants. The options may be chosen on the product page

to our Instagram","after_title":"

Follow us on Instagram, keep up to date with new products and share your impressions<\/p>","title_typography_typography":"custom","title_typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":40,"sizes":[]},"title_typography_font_size_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":32,"sizes":[]},"title_typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"title_typography_line_height":{"unit":"em","size":1.2,"sizes":[]},"text_typography_typography":"custom","text_typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":16,"sizes":[]},"scroll_y":-80,"color_gradient_color_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"color_gradient_color_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"color_gradient_color_b_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"color_gradient_color_b_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"color_gradient_gradient_angle_tablet":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"color_gradient_gradient_angle_mobile":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_color_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_color_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_color_b_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_color_b_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_gradient_angle_tablet":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"title_decoration_gradient_gradient_angle_mobile":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_color_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_color_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_color_b_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_color_b_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_gradient_angle_tablet":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_gradient_angle_mobile":{"unit":"deg","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_hover_color_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_hover_color_stop_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[]},"_background_hover_color_b_stop_tablet":{"unit":"%","size":"","sizes":[] item.content:encoded:

Hello Mr. Mackay (not Mr. Mackay? Log out)

From your account dashboard you can view your recent orders, manage your shipping and billing addresses, and edit your password and account details.
